name: Illia Polosukhin
key_contributions: Co-authored "Attention Is All You Need" (2017) — introduced the Transformer architecture
Co-founded NEAR Protocol in 2017, a layer-1 blockchain platform
Transitioned from AI research to decentralized computing
Demonstrated the cross-pollination between AI and Web3 communities
summary: Illia Polosukhin is a co-author of 'Attention Is All You Need' (2017), the paper that introduced the Transformer architecture. Unlike most of his co-authors who stayed in AI, Polosukhin pivoted to decentralized computing and co-founded NEAR Protocol, a layer-1 blockchain platform. His trajectory is notable as an example of how the Transformer paper's eight co-authors dispersed into very different domains after their world-changing collaboration.
